title: Submission: Recursive Layer Sharing | 13.9 MB | 1.53 BPB
author: negrurv

data.description: Removed the standard encoder/decoder split and recursively passed data through the same Block of weights 9 times during the forward pass.
Single shared block reused recursively across multiple passes.
Used a weightless RMSNorm variant (RMSNormNoWeight) to reduce parameter count.

novel_contributions: Recursive Transformer with a single shared Block reused 9 times
Removal of the standard encoder/decoder split
Weightless RMSNorm variant to reduce parameters
